payroll.name: EmploymentContract
payroll.description: Standard employment relationship under the Labour Code between an employee and an employer.

payroll.name: MandateContract
payroll.description: Civil-law contract for performing services or activities for a client with due diligence rather than guaranteeing a specific result.

payroll.name: SpecificWorkContract
payroll.description: Civil-law contract for delivering a specific, verifiable result or work for a client.

payroll.name: ServiceContract
payroll.description: Civil-law service contract to which mandate-contract rules generally apply when used for ongoing service provision.

business.name: NonRegisteredActivity
business.description: Small-scale gainful activity by a natural person that does not require business registration when statutory limits are met.

business.name: SoleProprietorship
business.description: Registered individual business activity commonly used by solo independent contractors and freelancers.

business.name: LimitedLiabilityCompany
business.description: Limited liability company that can be owned and operated by one person and is commonly used for B2B contracting.
